title: Production of lentiviral vectors pseudotyped with influenza neuraminidase (NA)
author: George Carnell
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rkkd4uw

steps.title: Prepare HEK293T/17 cells according to standard protocol
steps.instruction: Prepare HEK293T/17 cells according to standard protocol. Production of lentiviral PV was carried out by co-transfection of HEK293T/17 cells using branched polyethylenimine (PEI) or Endofectin Lenti™ transfection reagents.

steps.title: Briefly, a DNA mix of 0
steps.instruction: Briefly, a DNA mix of 0.5 µg of phCMV1-H11, 0.5 µg of p8.91, 0.75 µg of pCSFLW and either 1 µg of N1/Cal09 or N2/Tex12 was mixed in 200µl Opti-MEM™ and incubated for 20min with PEI (17.5µl of 1mg/ml PEI per well of a 6-well plate) or 25 min with Endofectin Lenti™ (3 µl/µg of DNA) per well of a 6-well plate. 00:20:00

steps.title: This mix was transferred to 60-90% confluent HEK293T/17 cells
steps.instruction: This mix was transferred to 60-90% confluent HEK293T/17 cells. a

steps.title: Cell culture medium (DMEM+10% FBS +1%...
steps.instruction: Cell culture medium (DMEM+10% FBS +1% Penicillin/Streptomycin) was changed after overnight incubation at +37°C 5% CO2 in a humidified incubator. Undetermined

steps.title: Cells were left for a further...
steps.instruction: Cells were left for a further 48h and supernatants harvested 72h post transfection, and sterile filtered through a 0.45µm filter (Merck Millipore). 48:00:00
